pages.text: Taglock Kits are used to collect $(item)Taglocks$() from other players or creatures. Taglocks, such as locks of hair, fingernail clippings or blood, are used in various practices to create a link between the creature and the magic.

pages.title: Collecting Taglocks
pages.text: Use a Taglock Kit on a creature, or the used bed of a player, to collect some Taglocks from that being. Repeated use on the same bed will cycle Taglocks for each player who has used that bed.$(p)The kit can also be used on a $(l:artifacts/traps/leech_chest)Leech Chest$(/l) to collect Taglocks from users who have opened the chest or on a $(l:artifacts/traps/blood_rose)Blood Poppy$(/l) to collect the Taglock of the player who walked through it.

pages.title: Failures to collect
pages.text: Collecting Taglocks by using the kit on a player has a chance of failing and informing the other player what you were trying to do. To increase the chance of collecting a Taglock from a player sneak, and prefer approaching from behind.
